content.en:
"Breakthrough!"

Ye Tian didn't need to test to know that his life level had broken 9.9, which was an unimaginable transformation!

At this moment, his strength has not improved much, but the life level of 9.9 represents the future potential!

It is not difficult for him to become a Ninefold Primordial Ancestor, and after becoming a Ninefold Primordial Ancestor in the future, he will not be restricted by the life level, and he can continue to improve.

Subsequently, Ye Tian replaced all the replica bodies, and the life level broke through to the level of 9.9.

......

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

Ye Tian began to test his life level, and it didn't take long for the results to come out.

【9.9】

This means that Ye Tian's life level has reached the level of 9.9, which is an achievement that countless half-step sevenfold ancestors have not achieved in the Nine-Story Building for a long time!

And this result was quickly known to the Guquan Xuanlou Mansion Master Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor.

For the first time, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor came to Ye Tian's face.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, you have really raised your life level to 9.9!"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor was shocked.

It's not that he hasn't seen demons, like some of the Ninefold Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building are also demons, and they have also raised their life level to the level of 9.9 in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm, and now their strength is the highest in the Ninefold Origin Ancestor Realm.

But even so, there is no such demon as Ye Tian, the growth speed is too fast!

He even suspected that Ye Tian was the reincarnation of an invincible Ninefold Ancestor, so it would be easy for him to raise his life level to 9.9, because he had done it in his previous life!

Otherwise, there is no way to explain it!

"Endless Dao Ancestor, if your life level is raised to 9.9, don't tell other Dao Ancestors, I will block the news. Even if the other Dao Ancestors were suspicious, they would not be sure if they did not have definite evidence. Except for you, me, and the high-level members of the Nine-Story Building, the other members of the Nine-Story Building are not qualified to know about this matter!" reminded the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor.

"Landlord, I know!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He also knew what a demon he was to raise his life level to 9.9 so quickly, and if it really leaked out, the competitors of the Nine Stories Building were afraid that they would attack him.

Therefore, secrecy for the time being is the best option.

......

Nine-story building, headquarters.

This place is located in a mysterious place, and those who can come here are the Ninefold Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building, and the ordinary Ninefold Ancestors can't enter here, they are all the existence of the peak of the Ninefold Ancestors, each of them is extremely powerful, and they are the real pillars of the Nine-Story Building.

At this time, they were discussing things about Ye Tian.

"The Nine-Story Building recently gave birth to a half-step sevenfold ancestor with a life level of 9.9, everyone knows it, right?"

"Got it, it's called Endless Dao Ancestor, it's very demonic, and the speed at which he raises his life level is very fast, far beyond the speed of my original speed!"

"Is it the reincarnation of someone?"

"It shouldn't be, according to the time, there hasn't been a reincarnation of any Ninefold Origin Ancestor recently, and there are only a few Dao Ancestors who have raised their life level to 9.9 in the half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, and there are no reincarnated Dao Ancestors who meet the requirements at all. "

"Even if I wait for reincarnation, it will be difficult to improve my life level so quickly, and I will be very fast in terms of creation, but if I want to raise my life level to 9.8, I can't rely on the background of my previous life!"

"Endless Dao Ancestor should have a big secret!"

"Who doesn't have a big secret, to be able to grow to the level of our equal, just relying on the 9.9 life level of the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor Realm can't do it!"

"In the future, this Endless Dao Ancestor will focus on it and be included in the first-class focus list, as for the reward, give him a primordial Dao treasure to save his life!"

"Well, with the qualifications and potential of the Endless Dao Ancestor, he is qualified to obtain a primordial Dao treasure for life-saving, so let the Peerless Sword Dao Ancestor give it to him. "

......

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

Ye Tian was stabilizing his life level, and after a while, he was ready to attack the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm.

And not long after, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor sent a Primordial Dao Treasure.

The Primordial Dao Treasure is a treasure with a higher value than the Primordial Ancient Treasure, and its value is incomparably high.

In the boundary of the Hanhai District, a primordial ancient treasure is enough to make the half-step eightfold original ancestor excited, and even the black lonely Dao ancestor of the half-step eightfold original ancestor only has one primordial ancient treasure, it is conceivable that the primordial Dao treasure that surpasses the primordial ancient treasure is so terrifying that the entire Hanhai Palace may not be comparable to a primordial Dao treasure.

Many Yae Primordial Ancestors couldn't afford to buy a Primordial Dao Treasure.

And now, Ye Tian actually received a reward from the Primordial Dao Treasure.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, this is the Primordial Dao Treasure - the Space-Time Golden Shuttle, once urged, it will form an indestructible shield, and it can bind a coordinate, you can directly bind the Ancient Spring Xuanlou, if you really encounter mortal danger, you can directly use the Space-Time Golden Shuttle to shuttle back to the Ancient Spring Xuanlou. Even if the enemy has a way to block the space-time golden shuttle, I will sense the abnormality and report it to the upper floors of the Nine-Fold Building, and the Nine-Fold Ancestor will take action. "

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said with some envy.

This kind of treatment, he was far from being able to compare with it at the beginning!

But he knew that Ye Tian deserved such treatment!

"Thank you, landlord!"

Ye Tian said happily.

In fact, he didn't need such a life-saving thing, after all, for him, the fall of a copy body was nothing, but he was naturally very happy to get a primordial Dao treasure for nothing.

Immediately, he accepted the space-time golden shuttle.

After the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor left, Ye Tian was ready to attack the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm.

And the Nine-Storied Building has a suitable treasure land to break through, and he directly spent 10 points to enter a treasure land in the Nine-Storied Building that is dedicated to breaking through - Jinhai!

Subsequently, Ye Tian entered the Golden Sea, and began to impact the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm in an independent time and space in the Golden Sea.

......

The half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor breaks through to become a Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and only needs to break through a certain boundary and comprehend the top Yuan Dao control technique, and then he can impact the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, but the probability of breaking through is high and low.

For Ye Tian, a breakthrough is naturally a 100% probability.

He has now broken through the eighty-one boundaries, and has created the Supreme Yuan Dao Control Technique, and his life level has reached 9.9, if he still can't break through, none of the countless half-step sevenfold ancestors in the many regional realms will be able to break through.

"Break through!"

Ye Tian easily shattered the realm shackles in the underworld with the supreme Yuan Dao control technique.

Rumble!!!!

Endless energy poured into Ye Tian's body from the golden sea, helping him break through the shackles and break through to the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm.

At the same time, a considerable part of the energy combined with Ye Tian's own life breath turned into a life path flower.

In a flash.

An illusory Life Dao Flower appeared behind Ye Tian, and as time passed, this Life Dao Flower became more and more condensed, and finally took shape.

"Ninefold Life Dao Flower, it's done!"

Ye Tian muttered.
